name: @krisgray/opencarl
description: OpenCARL - Context Augmentation & Reinforcement Layer for OpenCode (adapted from CARL by Chris Kahler)

scripts.build: npx tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/plugin.js'; if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('ERROR: '+p+' not found');process.exit(1)} console.log('[build] OpenCARL plugin built successfully'); console.log('[build] Output: '+require('path').resolve(p))"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npx ts-node scripts/verify-dist.ts
scripts.publish: npm run build && npm publish --access public

author: Kristian Gray
